# FinKit — Home Affordability Decision Assistant
# https://getfinkit.com

## Core Tools
/decision/mortgage: Mortgage Stress Test — evaluate whether your mortgage will create financial stress
/affordability-score: Home Affordability Score — get your 0-100 score with safe price range
/decision/rent-vs-buy: Rent vs Buy Calculator — 5-year cost comparison with break-even
/hidden-housing-costs: Hidden Housing Cost Analyzer — true monthly cost beyond the mortgage
/decision/timing: Market Timing Analysis — should you buy now or wait?
/decision/mortgage-vs-invest: Pay Down or Invest — mortgage payoff vs investing comparison

## Housing Decision Guides
/should-i-buy-a-house: Should you buy a house? 4 questions to answer first
/can-i-afford-a-house: Can you afford a house? Your numbers, not the bank's
/am-i-house-poor: Am I house poor? 4 signs + what to do
/house-poor-calculator: House poor calculator — check your risk
/mortgage-stress-test-guide: Mortgage stress test guide — how it works
/rent-vs-buy-decision: Rent vs buy decision — which builds more wealth?
/is-now-a-bad-time-to-buy: Is now a bad time to buy? Market timing analysis
/pay-off-mortgage-or-invest: Pay off mortgage or invest? Wealth comparison
/mortgage-payoff: Mortgage payoff calculator — pay off your mortgage early

## Financial Tools
/dashboard/debt: Debt Payoff Planner — snowball vs avalanche
/dashboard/loan: Loan Comparison Calculator — compare multiple loans
/dashboard/loans: Loan Comparison Matrix — side by side comparison

## Educational Content
/guides: Financial guides index
/guides/debt-payoff-timeline: Debt payoff timeline guide
/guides/loan-apr: Understanding loan APR
/guides/snowball-vs-avalanche: Snowball vs avalanche comparison
/guides/compound-interest: Compound interest explained
/guides/four-percent-rule: The 4% rule explained
/guides/fire-number: How to calculate your FIRE number
/guides/coast-fire: Coast FIRE explained
/blog: FinKit blog

## About
/privacy: Privacy policy
/terms: Terms of service
/contact: Contact FinKit
